name: GLADSTONE CAPITAL CORP
business: Gladstone Capital Corporation is an externally managed closed-end, non-diversified management investment company that invests in debt and equity securities of established lower middle market private businesses in the United States. Its primary investment strategy is to invest in secured first lien debt, secured second lien debt, and preferred and common equity, with investments typically ranging from $8 million to $40 million per portfolio company. The company targets businesses with annual EBITDA of $3 million to $25 million, focusing on generating current income and long-term capital appreciation.
